name: CBSA Assessment and Revenue Management (CARM)
evidence_role: commercial importer duty and tax account workflow
claim_boundary: Reference source only; does not prove CARM registration, accounting setup, duty payment readiness, or customs advice.

name: CBSA Import Commercial Goods Into Canada
evidence_role: commercial import process orientation
claim_boundary: Reference source only; does not replace CBSA, broker, customs, or legal review.

name: CBSA Customs Tariff 2026
evidence_role: Canadian tariff classification starting point
claim_boundary: Reference source only; classification and tariff treatment require qualified review.

name: CFIA Automated Import Reference System (AIRS)
evidence_role: CFIA-regulated commodity import requirement lookup
claim_boundary: Reference source only; product-specific food import compliance requires qualified review and source verification.

name: CBSA CI1 Canada Customs Invoice
evidence_role: official Canada customs invoice sample form for document parser orientation
claim_boundary: Reference source only; official sample form only; it is not customer evidence, customs approval, accounting proof, or shipment readiness.

name: CBSA A8A(B) Cargo Control Document
evidence_role: official cargo control sample form for transport-document parser orientation
claim_boundary: Reference source only; official sample form only; it does not prove cargo release, transport readiness, customs accounting, or compliance.

name: CFIA 5272 Request for Documentation Review
evidence_role: official CFIA documentation-review form for regulated-product parser orientation
claim_boundary: Reference source only; official sample form only; it does not prove CFIA clearance, admissibility, or compliance.

name: Global Affairs Canada Import Controls and Import Permits
evidence_role: import control and permit orientation
claim_boundary: Reference source only; does not prove whether a specific product requires an import permit.

name: Justice Laws Import Control List
evidence_role: legal reference for controlled imports
claim_boundary: Reference source only; legal interpretation and product applicability require qualified review.

name: Global Affairs Canada Consolidated Canadian Autonomous Sanctions List
evidence_role: restricted-party and sanctions screening source
claim_boundary: Reference source only; screening results require dated search records and reviewer signoff.

name: ISED Trade Data Online
evidence_role: Canadian trade data research source
claim_boundary: Reference source only; does not prove market size, buyer demand, or revenue.

name: Statistics Canada Web Data Service
evidence_role: machine-readable Canadian data-service route for trade tables after table and license review
claim_boundary: Reference source only; a data-service route does not prove a current trade value until a dated dataset row is ingested and cited.

name: Canadian Importers Database
evidence_role: importer discovery orientation
claim_boundary: Reference source only; does not prove buyer validation, supplier fit, customs advice, or freshness of a specific product row.

name: Government of Canada Export Guide
evidence_role: Canada export-planning guidance and beginner exporter orientation
claim_boundary: Reference source only; does not prove a specific exporter, product, destination, permit, or shipment is export-ready.

name: Global Affairs Canada Export Controls
evidence_role: Canada export-control and permit routing
claim_boundary: Reference source only; does not prove export-control classification, permit status, destination permission, or legal compliance.

name: CBSA Licensed Customs Brokers
evidence_role: qualified broker discovery source
claim_boundary: Reference source only; does not prove a broker relationship, review, or signoff.

name: ITC Market Access Map
evidence_role: tariff and market-access comparison research source
claim_boundary: Reference source only; does not prove tariff treatment, preference qualification, regulatory requirements, or market-access approval.

name: India Directorate General of Foreign Trade
evidence_role: India export policy and foreign-trade process orientation
claim_boundary: Reference source only; does not prove export permission, licensing status, incentive eligibility, or product-specific export compliance.

name: India DGFT Appendices and Aayat Niryat Forms
evidence_role: official DGFT form/source route for India exporter document requirements and future sample-form lookup
claim_boundary: Reference source only; no stable local PDF sample was verified in this pass and India export claims require current source review.

name: India Central Board of Indirect Taxes and Customs
evidence_role: India customs and tariff reference orientation
claim_boundary: Reference source only; does not prove tariff classification, export/import duty treatment, or customs compliance.

name: India CBIC Customs Forms Route
evidence_role: official CBIC source route for customs form lookup and future sample-form attachment
claim_boundary: Reference source only; no stable local PDF sample was verified in this pass and customs readiness claims remain blocked.

name: General Department of Vietnam Customs Portal
evidence_role: official Vietnam customs source route for origin/demo lane document lookup
claim_boundary: Reference source only; no stable local PDF sample was verified in this pass and Vietnam customs/export claims require current source review.

name: Global Affairs Canada sanctions
evidence_role: sanctions and restricted-country routing
claim_boundary: Reference source only; does not prove sanctions clearance, restricted-party screening, or permission to trade.

name: World Bank World Integrated Trade Solution
evidence_role: global trade, tariff, and non-tariff-measure research source
claim_boundary: Reference source only; does not prove buyer demand, profitability, market entry approval, or compliance.

name: International Trade Centre Trade Map
evidence_role: global import/export values, volumes, growth, market-share, and company-directory research source
claim_boundary: Reference source only; company or market rows are research signals and lead routes, not buyer validation or demand proof.

name: World Customs Organization Harmonized System
evidence_role: HS-code structure and commodity-classification doctrine source
claim_boundary: Reference source only; HS candidates are not tariff classification confirmation.

name: ICC Incoterms 2020
evidence_role: buyer/seller responsibility, task, cost, and risk allocation source
claim_boundary: Reference source only; responsibility guidance requires user confirmation and qualified review where legal or contract interpretation is needed.

name: Office of the Privacy Commissioner of Canada PIPEDA principles
evidence_role: privacy notice, consent, retention, deletion, safeguards, and access-rights design source
claim_boundary: Reference source only; does not prove privacy compliance, legal approval, or production data-processing readiness.

name: OWASP File Upload Cheat Sheet
evidence_role: secure upload architecture and file-handling control source
claim_boundary: Reference source only; hosted upload readiness requires product-specific security controls, scans, storage isolation, and review evidence.

name: OWASP GenAI prompt injection guidance
evidence_role: AI prompt-injection and external-content risk source
claim_boundary: Reference source only; does not prove AI safety, document safety, or model-output reliability.

name: NIST AI Risk Management Framework
evidence_role: AI risk-management and trustworthy-AI governance source
claim_boundary: Reference source only; does not certify the product or authorize AI to open compliance, customs, payment, privacy, or launch gates.

name: Stripe go-live checklist
evidence_role: live payment launch checklist source
claim_boundary: Reference source only; does not prove live payment readiness, tax review, refund/support readiness, webhook safety, or secure key handling.
